name: io.github.alptekin/evolutiondb-memory
title: EvolutionDB Long-Term Memory
description: Persistent long-term memory for Claude Desktop / Claude Code, backed by EvolutionDB. Save preferences, decisions, and biographical facts during a conversation; recall them in any future session through search_memory.

environmentVariables.name: EVOSQL_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Hostname where EvolutionDB is reachable on the PostgreSQL wire (port 5433).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_USER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Sticky namespace identifier for every memory Claude writes through this server. Server-side override — the LLM cannot fragment your namespace by inventing other IDs.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_STORE_PREFIX
environmentVariables.description: Prefix for the auto-created MEMORY STORE / ENTITY STORE catalog objects.
